title: vicia coquimbensis
intro: Vicia coquimbensis, also known as Chilean vetch or coquimbo vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Vicia coquimbensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction for its herbal remedies, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
